ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customer_data" (
  "clientnum" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "attrition_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating whether the customer has attrited (Existed or Attrited) */,
  "customer_age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "dependent_count" INTEGER /* Number of dependents the customer has */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Income category of the customer */,
  "card_category" TEXT /* Category of the credit card (e.g., Blue, Silver, Gold) */,
  "months_on_book" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been with the institution */,
  "total_relationship_count" INTEGER /* Total number of products and services the customer uses */,
  "months_inactive_12_mon" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been inactive in the last 12 months */,
  "contacts_count_12_mon" INTEGER /* Number of contacts the customer has had with the institution in the last 12 months */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit assigned to the customer */,
  "total_revolving_bal" INTEGER /* Total revolving balance on the customer's credit card */,
  "avg_open_to_buy" REAL /* Average open-to-buy amount (credit limit minus revolving balance) */,
  "total_amt_chng_q4_q1" REAL /* Total change in transaction amount from Q1 to Q4 */,
  "total_trans_amt" INTEGER /* Total transaction amount in the last 12 months */,
  "total_trans_ct" INTEGER /* Total transaction count in the last 12 months */,
  "total_ct_chng_q4_q1" REAL /* Total change in transaction count from Q1 to Q4 */,
  "avg_utilization_ratio" REAL /* Average utilization ratio (revolving balance divided by credit limit) */,
  "naive_bayes_classifier_attrition_flag_card_category_contacts_count_12_mon_dependent_count_education_level_months_inactive_12_mon_1" REAL /* Naive Bayes classifier probability for attrition prediction (model 1) */,
  "naive_bayes_classifier_attrition_flag_card_category_contacts_count_12_mon_dependent_count_education_level_months_inactive_12_mon_2" REAL /* Naive Bayes classifier probability for attrition prediction (model 2) */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of residence */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of employment */,
  "last_contact_date" TEXT /* Date of the last contact with the customer */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction by the customer */,
  "customer_satisfaction_score" INTEGER /* Score representing customer satisfaction */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Textual feedback provided by the customer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user managing the customer account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clientnum")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each customer
